title: drimia depressa
intro: Drimia depressa, also known as the squill or dragon's breath, is a plant species belonging to the family Asparagaceae. It is a perennial bulbous plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Drimia depressa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
